steps.title: Use the success signals
steps.content: The program identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases and could even determine sidewalk material. The passage also calls this performance already strong. The blank must describe a consistent, dependable performance.

steps.title: Match the performance word
steps.content: Choice A means awkwardly or poorly, which conflicts with the success described. Choice C means infrequently, the opposite of the vast majority. Choice D concerns speed, but the passage is about accuracy and consistency. Reliably fits the context. The answer is B.
